meta.purpose: Source registry for the Stewards' Room 8am trawl (Stage B reads this). Tiers: 'endpoint' (structured/PDF data, parse directly), 'server-html' (full content in raw HTML, fetch+parse), 'headless-candidate' (JS-rendered, needs browser, only if value justifies), 'websearch' (reach via Claude web search in the research pass), 'avoid' (paywall/anti-bot/TOS, do not scrape).
meta.caveat: Verdicts tested via Claude-side fetch on 06/07/2026 or validated in prior chat sessions; borderline cases re-verified from Vercel in Stage B since bot-detection treats fetchers differently.

sources.name: Singapore Pools racecards + tipster/analysis PDFs
sources.verdict: PROVEN in production (Outsider Triage v2). The spine: integrated numbering + coupon codes the slip must match.

sources.name: Open-Meteo weather at track coordinates
sources.verdict: PROVEN (Touch Grass HKT), keyless JSON.

sources.name: Gold Circle (KZN + official SA tote previews)
sources.verdict: VERIFIED 06/07 direct fetch: homepage carries next meeting's full card, official per-race Selections, PA/Pick6/Jackpot perms, Best Bet, Value Bet, Brandon Bailey race-time comments, Thiselton previews, racecard + gallop-form PDFs. Tier-1 adapter.

sources.name: Race Coast (Harrison / van Deventer same-day previews)
sources.verdict: Validated in prior sessions (Model Notes v41-42: 'gold'). Re-verify Vercel-side Stage B.

sources.name: Sky Racing World previews + form guide
sources.verdict: Search-index verified 06/07: full per-race SA preview articles with selections; AU/KR core regions.

sources.name: Raceform sectionals + Clockwatcher speed ratings
sources.verdict: Validated in prior sessions (data cross-check layer).

sources.name: Sporting Post
sources.verdict: Reach via research pass.

sources.name: Hong Kong Jockey Club racing info
sources.verdict: VERIFIED 06/07 direct fetch: full runner tables server-rendered with clean date/course/race URL params; per-race and all-races PDFs; Tips Index (aggregated tipsters) is legacy ASP, likely fetchable; SIMULCAST cards (S1 SA, S2 UK, S3 GER, S4 FR) give a second official card source for SGPools' own overseas meets. SpeedPRO likely JS (headless candidate).

sources.name: Turkish Jockey Club (TJK)
sources.verdict: VERIFIED 06/07 direct fetch: daily program server-rendered, parameterised date+city, EN mirror, last-800m sectionals query, stewards reports, foreign simulcast listings (incl Lingfield on test day).

sources.name: Selangor Turf Club
sources.verdict: Approved source, heavily used in prior sessions; search-index verified 06/07: local cards, international card PDFs (SA/AU incl R&S express form EN+CN), Top Picks of the Day, full stewards' reports.

sources.name: korearacing.live
sources.verdict: Validated in prior sessions; Sunday feature preview publishes Saturday KST ~00:00-03:00.

sources.name: Prono Turf Gratuit (Top 10 press synthesis)
sources.verdict: Validated prior sessions + search-index 06/07: daily Top 10 press table, most-cited 8 horses, quinte-de-demain available evening before. The pre-computed convergence grid.

sources.name: Frequence Turf press synthesis articles
sources.verdict: Search-index verified 06/07: full per-outlet ordered picks (Genybet, ZEturf, Canalturf, Turfomania, Equidia...) + weighted citation ranking.

sources.name: Canalturf pronostics + synthesis tables
sources.verdict: Legacy PHP pages, search-index verified 06/07; verify Vercel-side Stage B.

sources.name: Stats-Quinte weighted press consensus
sources.verdict: Search-index verified 06/07: 5-source weighted consensus, base identification.

sources.name: Geny / Equidia / Zeturf
sources.verdict: Reach via research pass; already covered inside the FR synthesis sources above.

sources.name: At The Races preview articles
sources.verdict: Validated prior sessions: preview ARTICLES reach text (JS racecards do not).

sources.name: Sporting Life
sources.verdict: Reach via research pass.

sources.name: Racing Post
sources.verdict: Paywall + anti-bot; free-tier content only, via research pass. Do not scrape.

sources.name: Timeform
sources.verdict: Premium product; free articles via research pass only. Do not scrape.

sources.name: Racenet / Punters / racing.com / Just Horse Racing / bets.com.au preview articles
sources.verdict: Validated prior sessions: text preview/tips ARTICLES reach fetch; interactive racecard/speed-map tools are JS dead ends (Model Notes v41-42). Fetch articles, not tools.

sources.name: Racing and Sports form guides + meeting PDFs
sources.verdict: BLOCKED 06/07 to direct fetch (bot detection) despite rich server-side content in search index. Research-pass tier; Stage B re-tests from Vercel and probes the per-meeting Get-PDF links; headless candidate if value demands.

sources.name: netkeiba / FanDuel Japan previews
sources.verdict: Research pass only; region carries the standing 'no Japan without prior conviction' caution flag anyway.

sources.name: Betfair Exchange official API
sources.verdict: Official API exists (key + account required); never scrape the site. Optional future add-on, not in scope.

sources.name: TAB / Sportsbet / Neds / Ladbrokes / Bet365
sources.verdict: Actively anti-bot and TOS-protected. Do not scrape. Market colour comes from press articles instead.

headlessCandidates: racing-and-sports form tools (only if Vercel fetch also blocked AND PDF route fails)
stageBNotes: Re-verify every 'server-html' source from a Vercel function with realistic headers; Claude-side and Vercel-side fetchers get different bot-detection treatment.
Probe R&S per-meeting 'Get PDF' links directly; PDFs often bypass page-level bot walls.
HKJC tips_index.asp is the highest-value single tipster-aggregation endpoint; confirm it parses.
Simulcast cross-referencing: HKJC S-cards and TJK foreign listings double-cover SGPools' own overseas meets; use as verification layer for runner maps.
Respect robots and rate limits: one trawl per day, cache everything in Redis, identify honestly in User-Agent.
